title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server for running large language models locally; pulls, manages, and exposes models via REST and CLI.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter giving chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines native Ollama support.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama; markdown, code highlight, multi-user, RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent API, async, and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; chat, embed, and list models idiomatically.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-enhanced CLI wrapper with interactive model picker, config profiles, and plugins.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that uses Ollama models for inline code suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing Ollama generators and embedders for production pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-express
summary: Lightweight Express.js proxy that adds JWT auth, rate limits, and OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + llama.cpp for vector search and generation.

title: ollama-swift
summary: Swift Package Manager client for iOS/macOS apps wanting local LLM power via Ollama.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package downloaded 200k+ times; zero dependencies, ESM & CJS builds.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: Official PyPI package with 100k+ monthly downloads; supports Python 3.8+.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official multi-arch Docker images (CPU & GPU) with one-line run commands.

title: ollama-huggingface
summary: Hugging Face Space that lets you try Ollama models in-browser via Gradio.
